$comment: Design token file for the Carousel Arrow component
$description: Circular navigation button overlaid on the carousel to advance or retreat slides. Props: chevron direction (Left/Right), size (sm/md/lg), colour theme (Primary/Secondary/Tertiary), and interactive state (Default/Hover/Active/Disabled). Primary is a solid filled blue button used on light backgrounds. Secondary is a dark semi-opaque button (with backdrop blur) for use on image/video slides. Tertiary is a white/glass button (with backdrop blur on sm and md; lg Tertiary omits blur in Figma). All sizes use 8px uniform padding.

padding.description: Uniform 8px inset on all sides — applies to all sizes and themes

left.description: GHL icon name for the left-facing chevron

right.description: GHL icon name for the right-facing chevron

button-size.description: Width and height of the sm circular button

icon-size.description: Width and height of the sm chevron icon

border-radius.description: Fully circular sm button (20px on a 32px element)

button-size.description: Width and height of the md circular button

icon-size.description: Width and height of the md chevron icon

border-radius.description: Fully circular md button (20px on a 36px element)

button-size.description: Width and height of the lg circular button

icon-size.description: Width and height of the lg chevron icon

border-radius.description: Fully circular lg button (22px on a 40px element)

primary.description: Solid filled blue button. No backdrop blur. Icon is always white.

icon-color.description: White chevron on all Primary states

backdrop-blur.description: Primary arrows do not apply backdrop blur

disabled.description: #84adff — washed-out light blue when the arrow is unavailable (first/last slide)

secondary.description: Dark semi-opaque button designed for use over image/video content. Applies backdrop-blur 4px on all sizes.

icon-color.description: White chevron on all Secondary states

backdrop-blur.description: 4px backdrop blur applied to all Secondary sizes

disabled.description: #d0d5dd — light gray when the arrow is unavailable

tertiary.description: White glass button. Backdrop blur applies to sm and md only — lg Tertiary omits blur (Figma source inconsistency, preserved faithfully). Icon colour shifts from gray/600 to gray/300 when disabled.

default.description: #475467 — dark gray chevron in Default/Hover/Active states

disabled.description: #d0d5dd — faded gray chevron when the arrow is unavailable

sm-md.description: 4px backdrop blur on sm and md Tertiary buttons

lg.description: lg Tertiary does not apply backdrop blur per Figma source

hover.description: #f2f4f7 — very light gray background on hover

disabled.description: White background when unavailable — same as default; only the icon colour signals disabled state
